docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEWIS, IRMA AS TO DEFENDANT HIRSCH, AMILEA DOE 1-50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-07-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-03-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-21-2008
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-05-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-05-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: HELEN SOREP-MATLEY, CSR	225. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-21-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-07-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HIRSCH, AMELIA (SUED AS HIRSCH, AMILEA)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-30-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE APR-21-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUN-23-2008. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-11-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. MAY-30-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUL-03-2008.
ARBITRATOR MATTHEW FRANKLIN QUINT APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-07-2008 THROUGH OCT-05-2008.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-11-2008 AFTER HEARING; NO SETTLEMENT REACHED.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE . EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-03-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
